evidence_excerpt: She was followed up through three years with stability of symptoms and no additional signs of PSP.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Frequent falls and axial rigidity persisted; levodopa 800 mg daily resulted in no improvement, and symptoms were stable over three years.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Levodopa 800 mg daily resulted in no improvement.

notes_on_uncertainty: Index time approximated to when FXTAS was confirmed by FMR1 premutation testing. Precise dates for treatment initiation and follow-up visits are not provided, so event timing is marked as unknown. Functional status severity is inferred conservatively from persistent frequent falls and axial rigidity without dopaminergic response.
